name: Beef Stroganoff

ingredients.item: (10.5 oz.) can condensed cream of mushroom soup
sour cream – taste it and add more if you want

method: Prepare the egg noodles in boiling salted water for 5 minutes and set aside.
Brown the beef in a large skillet or pot for 5 minutes.
Stir in the onion, garlic and mushrooms and sauté for another 5 minutes.
Pour in the cream of mushroom soup, broth, Worcestershire sauce, sherry, dry Ranch dressing and season with salt and pepper.
Stir in the sour cream and simmer for 5 more minutes.
Place the egg noodles on a platter and top with the beef stroganoff.
